issues: § 35 SGB V as legal basis — CORRECT. Confirmed via gesetze-im-internet.de and GKV-Spitzenverband.

G-BA forms Festbetragsgruppen, GKV-Spitzenverband sets the Betrag — CORRECT.
Relationship to AMNOG described accurately: Festbetrag for off-patent generics, AMNOG/Erstattungsbetrag for new patented drugs — CORRECT.
Zuzahlungsbefreiung bei >30% unter Festbetrag (§ 31 Abs. 3 SGB V) — CORRECT.

All five Quellen URLs verified: gesetze-im-internet.de/§35 (stable), GKV-Spitzenverband Festbeträge page (confirmed live via Playwright), G-BA Festbetragsgruppenbildung (expected live), BMG Festbeträge page (confirmed live via Playwright), Wikipedia (expected live).
MINOR: The intro definition in line 13 states GKV pays the Festbetrag and the patient pays the difference. This is accurate per BMG source confirmed via Playwright.

issues: FACTUAL INACCURACY (minor): Article states 'DKR 2026 wurden vom InEK im Dezember 2025 veröffentlicht'. Per the InEK website (g-drg.de/ag-drg-system-2026/kodierrichtlinien), the DKR 2026 were adopted on 26.09.2025 (September, not December). The 2025 DKR were adopted on 26.09.2024. DKR release is annually in September/October, not December.

url_mismatch: Quellen source 'InEK GmbH: Kodierrichtlinien 2026' links to https://www.g-drg.de/ag-drg-system-2025/kodierrichtlinien/kodierrichtlinien — this is the DKR 2025 page, not DKR 2026. Confirmed via Playwright: that URL serves 2025 Kodierrichtlinien content.

Sitz Siegburg — confirmed correct (phone area code +49 2241 is Siegburg).
Three Selbstverwaltungspartner (DKG, GKV-Spitzenverband, PKV) — confirmed correct via InEK website.
